details.title: New Beta Features
items: "Enhanced Search" adds fuzzy and abbreviated searching in inventory, marketplace, Send Supplies, and the Trap Selector
"Timers" adds an item to the Camp menu dropdown with countdowns for different locations

details.title: Better Maps
items: Updated sorting data for many existing map types
Added the "Default to Sorted tab (only if map is categorized)" setting
Map enhancements now load and update more reliably

details.title: Location HUDs and Catch Stats
items: Location Catch Stats has been redesigned with completion progress for each location, crown counts, and more.
Added a "Use simplified view" setting for Location Catch Stats to restore the previous version.
Added a Cerulean Skyport Location Dashboard
Updated HUD styling for Cerulean Skyport, Floating Islands, Valour Rift, and other locations
Updated the Valour Rift simulator for the Hailstone Singularity Base

details.title: More Improvements
items: Expanded Native Dark Mode coverage across nearly every module
Extension updates now load faster and data is kept more up-to-date
Fixed a variety of issues and improved performance across many modules
